description: National Gallery of Art (Washington DC) golden search cases (14): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the NGA rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-05 against the 2,808-row on-view set (objects.csv rows with a resolvable locationid — West + East Buildings). Tiers mirror the Met/AIC/Cleveland sets: autocomplete = local FTS top-8; full = all-results; llm = relaxed-FTS stand-in for the interpret tier.
